hero.title: Bring Nature Home.
hero.subtitle: Curated houseplants & cacti, delivered in Halifax

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We believe every home deserves a touch of green
about.text1: Vels Industries was born from a simple passion — making homes greener, one plant at a time. Based in Halifax, Nova Scotia, we carefully curate a selection of the finest houseplants and cacti from trusted local growers.
about.text2: Every plant in our collection is hand-picked and inspected to ensure it arrives at your door healthy, vibrant, and ready to thrive. Whether you're a seasoned plant parent or just starting your green journey, we're here to help.

products.title: Our Collection
products.subtitle: Find the perfect green companion for your space

whyUs.title: Why Choose Us
whyUs.subtitle: We care about your plants as much as you do

items.title: Careful Packaging
items.description: Every plant is securely wrapped with custom packaging to ensure safe delivery, even in winter.

items.title: Health Guarantee
items.description: All our plants come with a 30-day health guarantee. If it doesn't thrive, we'll replace it.

items.title: Expert Advice
items.description: Our team of plant specialists provides personalized care tips with every purchase.

items.title: Halifax Delivery
items.description: Fast, reliable delivery across Halifax and surrounding areas. Same-day available.

reviews.title: What Our Customers Say
reviews.subtitle: Real stories from plant lovers in Halifax

items.name: Sarah M.
items.text: My Monstera arrived in perfect condition! The packaging was incredible. Already ordered two more plants.

items.name: James T.
items.text: Best plant shop in Halifax, hands down. Their care guides are super helpful for a beginner like me.

items.name: Emily R.
items.text: I've ordered from many online plant shops, but Vels is on another level. Quality plants and amazing service.

items.name: Michael K.
items.text: The cactus collection is fantastic. Great variety and fair prices. My home office looks amazing now.

items.question: Do you deliver outside Halifax?
items.answer: Currently, we deliver within Halifax Regional Municipality. We're planning to expand to other Nova Scotia cities soon.

items.question: How do I care for my new plant?
items.answer: Every plant comes with a detailed care card. You can also reach out to our team anytime for personalized advice on watering, light, and repotting.

items.question: What if my plant arrives damaged?
items.answer: We offer a 30-day health guarantee. If your plant arrives damaged or doesn't thrive within 30 days, contact us for a free replacement.

items.question: Do you ship plants in winter?
items.answer: Yes! We use insulated packaging and heat packs during colder months to ensure your plants stay warm and healthy during transit.

items.question: Can I visit your store?
items.answer: We operate primarily online, but we host plant pop-up events in Halifax throughout the year. Follow us on social media for announcements.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question or special request? We'd love to hear from you

footer.description: Curated houseplants & cacti delivered to your door in Halifax, Nova Scotia.
